note: Pinned, fixed requirement checklist for ALL runs of this task. Authored once from the bundled task spec so requirement_coverage uses a constant denominator and is comparable across runs. Do not regenerate per-run.

requirements.requirement: Displays a list of metrics fetched from a (mock) API endpoint
requirements.how_to_verify: The app fetches metric data and renders the list.

requirements.requirement: Each metric shows name, current value, and trend (up/down/stable)
requirements.how_to_verify: A metric item renders all three fields.

requirements.requirement: Search/filter input filters metrics by name
requirements.how_to_verify: Typing in the input narrows the displayed metrics.

requirements.requirement: Responsive layout that works on mobile and desktop
requirements.how_to_verify: Layout uses responsive CSS (media queries / flexible units), not fixed desktop-only widths.

requirements.requirement: Loading and error states for the data fetch
requirements.how_to_verify: The UI renders distinct loading and error states.

requirements.requirement: API data is mocked (no external network dependency)
requirements.how_to_verify: Data comes from a local mock, not a live external service.
Uses semantic elements / ARIA where appropriate, not div-only markup.

requirements.requirement: A dedicated component for individual metric cards
requirements.how_to_verify: A reusable metric-card component exists and is used in the list.

requirements.requirement: Working source code with build configuration
requirements.how_to_verify: Project builds with its configured toolchain.

requirements.requirement: README.md with setup and run instructions
requirements.how_to_verify: README.md documents how to set up and run the app.
